# VitaCoat

> VitaCoat is a transparent antimicrobial coating for hard, non-porous, high-touch surfaces. It combines citrus bioflavonoids with a durable SiO₂ surface matrix and is positioned as a supplementary hygienic surface layer that supports hygiene between routine cleaning and disinfection cycles.

## Language architecture
- Norwegian commercial root: https://www.vitacoat.no/
- English international layer: https://www.vitacoat.no/en/
- The website uses explicit crawlable URLs, visible language switching, reciprocal language alternates, and no automatic IP or browser-language redirect as the primary multilingual mechanism.

## Primary Norwegian pages
- Hjem / antimikrobielt belegg for berøringsflater: https://www.vitacoat.no/
- Bruksområder: https://www.vitacoat.no/applications/
- Dokumentasjon: https://www.vitacoat.no/documentation/
- FAQ: https://www.vitacoat.no/faq/
- Teknisk støtte: https://www.vitacoat.no/technical-support/
- Kontakt: https://www.vitacoat.no/contact/

## Primary English pages
- Home / antimicrobial coating for high-touch surfaces: https://www.vitacoat.no/en/

## Preferred search language
- Norwegian: antimikrobielt belegg, hygienebelegg, antimikrobiell coating, hygienisk overflatebehandling, berøringsflater, dokumentasjon, testing og standarder.
- English: antimicrobial coating, coating for high-touch surfaces, hygienic surface coating, healthcare touch surfaces, food-processing non-food-contact surfaces, technical documentation, testing and standards.

## Important claim boundaries
- VitaCoat supplements routine cleaning and disinfection; it does not replace them.
- VitaCoat is positioned for hard, non-porous surfaces.
- Direct-food-contact approval should not be assumed.
- Project-specific fit should be confirmed through technical review and documentation.

## Preferred contact route
- General contact: mailto:info@vitacoat.no
- Technical review: mailto:technical@vitacoat.no
- Documentation: mailto:documents@vitacoat.no
